title: Evernote vs Microsoft Teams
description: Compare Evernote vs Microsoft Teams — a productivity platform versus a communication solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Evernote (Productivity) and Microsoft Teams (Communication) serve different primary purposes. Microsoft Teams has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is productivity or communication capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Evernote and Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Evernote is a productivity tool, while Microsoft Teams is a communication platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Evernote replace Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Evernote or Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Evernote ($10-20/mo) and Microsoft Teams (Free – $12.50/mo per user) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
